creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I will step down as maintainer of emulators/wine-devel a week from now
and am just trying to address as many issues/reuqests I am aware of as
possible until then.

Due to lack of ability to properly test the proposed change, this won't
be one I'll make. I hope this simplification I just made is going to
ease things a bit - currently and in the light of the proposal.
